element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core traversal and combat ability central to protagonist's identity as half C-Life being
Progressive complexity as game advances through cyber-terrorism stages
Environmental challenges tied to corrupted computer world aesthetic
Climactic encounters with central antagonist across multiple forms

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections between enemy gauntlets
Volteccer speed sections that provide momentum control
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based pacing with escalating challenge from early exploration through mid-stage combat gauntlets to stage-end boss confrontations

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to Volteccer mechanics with basic platform traversal and simple enemy encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and complexity; environmental hazards integrate with stage design; Volteccer mastery required for progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained pressure from Galaxy Gang encounters; boss patterns grow complex; final confrontation with corrupted Doc Waruyama entity
notable_spikes: Final stages emphasizing Volteccer precision requirements

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages themed around EUREKA system manifestation points and Galaxy Gang strongholds; visual design reflects computer world digitization with corrupted environments
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multiple stages across Galaxy Gang territory

notable_level_patterns.description: Segments requiring rapid dash movement through enemy formations or obstacle courses; core mechanic stress-testing
Each stage concludes with manifestation of antagonist force; Pulseman must confront aspects of corrupted father through combat
